svg.title: Object Diagram: Patient Rates Doctor After Consultation

g.text: Object Diagram: Patient Rates Doctor After Consultation
Patient John Tan rates Dr. Sarah Lee with 5 stars
after completed consultation. System calculates new average rating,
updates doctor profile, and sends notification to doctor.
Rating submission, calculation, profile update, notification
ReviewText = "Excellent doctor! Very thorough examination and clear explanation. Dr. Lee took time to understand my concerns and provided comprehensive treatment plan. Highly recommend!"
Message = "John Tan rated your consultation 5 stars with excellent feedback"
Formula: (Old Avg × Old Count + New Rating) ÷ New Count
